zone_placement_rules.notes: shop.pattern.md: 'Center the entrance on the room's primary axis of symmetry unless a specific narrative or spatial reason requires an off-center door.'

variants.notes: One straight centerline aisle, no browse loop -- the minimal, always-valid variant.
Aisle widens into a browse loop per shop.pattern.md's 'widen to two-plus tiles where the lane branches into a browsing loop.'

provenance.notes: allow_reflection reflects shop.pattern.md's bilateral composition rule (left/right merchandise clusters counterbalance without being mirrored tile-for-tile); reflection varies which side wall_stock resolves to, not a literal furniture mirror.
